title: Make lint was complaining about some vetshowed err
body:
We often use err as a variable inside of subblocks, and
we don't want golint to complain about it.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body:
The feature's experimental (i.e., known to not be 100% correct), so okay.
@rh-atomic-bot +r

:pushpin: Commit 1b62620 has been approved by `nalind`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=nalind 1b6262085c340a4ad489318f461e21f26c703fec -->
:zap: Test exempted: pull fully rebased and already tested.
